rationale: NEAR Protocol targets a fixed 5% annual issuance of total supply, of which ~4.5% goes to validators/stakers and ~0.5% to the protocol treasury; however, roughly 30% of transaction fees are burned, which reduces net inflation meaningfully below the gross 5% target — at current fee-burn rates the net effective inflation is approximately 4–4.5%. The burn mechanism means net inflation trends slightly downward as network usage and fee volume grow over the next 24 months.
